title: Sourceflow Infinite
description: Sourceflow Infinite is a tech-focused mod built around fluid recycling and production.
body:
# Sourceflow Infinite

---

![Sourceflow Infinite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee5cf0a20dd3989fb3fb96a91dbe0da0029cc41b.png)

## Introduction

Sourceflow Infinite is a tech-focused mod built around **fluid recycling and production**. The core loop connects two machines through an intermediate medium called **Void Fluid**: players can use the **Destruction Machine** to “destroy” any fluid and convert it into Void Fluid according to the configured rules, then use the **Infinite Fluid Machine** to convert Void Fluid into the **bound** target fluid—enabling a controlled fluid loop and automated production line. It works great with pipes, tanks, and logic control setups to build a stable infinite-fluid factory.

This mod is highly configurable via:
- `config/yuanliuwujin-server.toml` (1.21.1)
- `config/yuanliuwujin-common.toml` (1.20.1)

You can customize options such as: the blacklist (supports both IDs and tags), whether unbinding is allowed in Survival, Void Fluid behavior, machine power usage/capacity, conversion ratios for different core levels, and overclock pressure & explosion parameters.

This mod also supports recipe modification through **KubeJS**.

## Example Screenshots

Example usage with Mekanism

![Sourceflow Infinite with Mek](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4975251ba85f73b5d490f22ee4f295c40ec36c8_0.webp)
![Sourceflow Infinite with Mek](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e028e5fec9c18a8cc6a9216ffd4fc015651fa32_0.webp)

![Sourceflow Infinite with Create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99b731779000f8edbc2754d57805b968a3bf0cf3_0.webp)

## Related

This mod is compatible with [[Mek] Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism), enabling chemical destruction and production.

This mod is compatible with [[JEI] Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), allowing you to view the relevant recipes for fluid/chemical production and destruction.

## Notes & Closing

If you encounter any issues, or have suggestions for future updates or mod compatibility/integration, feel free to open an issue or submit a report on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/yelle233/Sourceflow-Infinite/issues).

Contributions are welcome — you’re also welcome to help improve and update this mod’s documentation.

Thank you all for your support and suggestions. Have fun!
More detailed information, introductions, or tutorials for this mod can be found via the link below:
[Github](https://github.com/yelle233/Sourceflow-Infinite)
